final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

    if (reset) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable && count != 4'b1111) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
